- rephrase it
- make it larger
- make it smaller
- flip your hypothesis
- see it from the future

fullText:
The fuel for a Falcon 9 launch costs only a few hundred thousand dollars, a tiny fraction of a roughly $70 million mission.

The expensive part used to be throwing away the rocket. Reusability is what changed the economics and drove launch costs way down.
